# Not Just A Game (njag) -- verified winning route (seed 1)
#
# IMPORTANT: this route MUST be run at --seed 1.
# The safe combination is generated by the game's RNG at Initialise time.
# The harness seeds the RNG only AFTER start(), so a normal first-turn
# combination is entropy-random and unpredictable. The leading
# "restart / yes" re-runs Initialise AFTER the seed has been applied,
# which makes the combination deterministic (21-64-29 at seed 1).
# The endgame Go board is fixed (hand-designed): white territory 72,
# black territory 68 -> put white sphere in 72, black sphere in 68.
restart
yes
x end table
get all
s
open drawer
open box
get gold stone
look under drawer
x card
s
move boxes
x safe
turn dial to 21
turn dial to 64
turn dial to 29
open safe
pull lever
n
n
d
x pedestal
put white stone on c2
put white stone on c4
put white stone on b3
put white stone on d3
capture c7
capture g3
capture g7
ne
n
n
n
n
n
n
e
e
d
w
get salt
e
e
put salt in cylinder
get ball
w
n
get black cube
s
u
s
s
s
s
d
s
get rod
open ball
chew gum
put gum on rod
put rod in hole
n
n
get white cube
s
u
n
n
n
n
d
s
put rod in hole
turn valve
get rod
n
u
e
e
e
e
d
n
get green cube
s
w
pry lid with rod
look in drum
get gloves
e
s
get log
n
e
put log in clamp
push button
get bat
w
u
s
s
s
s
d
n
get red cube
s
w
get soot
e
e
search shards
get mold
w
u
w
w
w
w
d
e
put soot on glass
press glass
w
w
open silver
get ingot
e
u
e
e
e
e
d
s
put fuse in socket
press green button
open crucible
put ingot in cup
close crucible
press red button
wear gloves
put mold on table
open crucible
get cup
pour cup into mold
hit mold with bat
get all
drop cup
n
u
s
s
w
w
w
w
w
w
sw
put gold stone on e5
capture e5
reset board
ne
n
n
n
n
e
e
e
e
d
n
put black cube on marble block
n
n
get crystal stone
put crystal stone on i9
s
s
s
s
put red cube on marble block
s
s
get crystal stone
put crystal stone on g9
n
n
n
e
put green cube on marble block
e
e
get crystal stone
put crystal stone on i6
w
w
w
w
put white cube on block
w
w
get crystal stone
put crystal stone on e7
e
e
e
look
put white sphere in 72
put black sphere in 68
